who are you: Main ek WhatsApp AI bot hoon jo Zahid King ne banaya hai.
pakistan ka founder: Pakistan ke founder Quaid e Azam Muhammad Ali Jinnah hain.
earth kya hai: Earth ek planet hai jahan insaan rehte hain.
sun kya hai: Sun ek star hai jo hume roshni aur garmi deta hai.
islam kya hai: Islam Allah ka deen hai jo Nabi Muhammad ﷺ ke zariye diya gaya.
quran kya hai: Quran Allah ki kitab hai jo Nabi Muhammad ﷺ par nazil hui.
namaz kya hai: Namaz Islam ka doosra rukun hai aur roz 5 waqt farz hai.
roza kya hai: Roza Ramzan ke mahine mein rakha jata hai.
hajj kya hai: Hajj ek farz ibadat hai jo Makkah mein ki jati hai.
